sequence: 1. Provision SSL certificate via Let's Encrypt / Google Managed Certificates
2. Configure Application Load Balancer to terminate TLS 1.3
3. Configure NGINX reverse-proxy sidecar in container pod to route HTTPS to FastAPI
tls_transport.cert_handling: Automated renewal via DNS-01 challenges, zero manual key exposure
tls_transport.reverse_proxy: Envoy proxy deployed at front boundary of the cluster namespace

authn_authz.oauth2_oidc_integration: Google Cloud Identity Platform Integration configured as FastAPI security dependency
authn_authz.session_policy: Token TTL set to 1 hour, rotation enabled, refresh token stored securely in HTTP-only secure cookie

audit_ledger.event_design: Ledger table with event_uuid, actor_identity, action, timestamp, payload_hash, signature
audit_ledger.schema: CREATE TABLE audit_ledger (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, event_uuid UUID UNIQUE, actor VARCHAR(255), action VARCHAR(100), metadata JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
audit_ledger.retention: 7-year retention policy, archived to cold storage GCS buckets with Object Lifecycle Management

mutation_safety.approval_gate_design: FastAPI middleware intercepts mutating routes, checks signature payload from verification provider
mutation_safety.write_path_blocking_policy: All non-GET requests block by default unless accompanied by active approval token

rollout_plan: 1. Enable GitHub Actions / Cloud Build SBOM generation step
2. Store generated SBOM and in-toto provenance artifacts in Artifact Registry
3. Enable GKE Binary Authorization verifying Cosign signatures on container deployment

boundaries.local: Local development sandboxes, mock data only
boundaries.staging: Identical clone of production, connected to staging database and test sensors
boundaries.production: Production-grade hardened cluster, strictly regulated access control

environment_separation.promotion_gates: Pull request -> Staging deploy -> Automated contract validation -> Manual operator approval -> Production release

observability.logging: Winston/FastAPI structured log format writing to stdout, collected by OpenTelemetry Collector
observability.metrics: Prometheus exporter tracking active sessions, prompt throughput, and API request latency
observability.health: Health checks integrated into Kubernetes liveness/readiness probes
observability.alerting: Alertmanager rules paging operators on rate of 5xx HTTP responses or database replication lag

recovery.backup_test_plan: Automated restore tests run every Tuesday, verifying zero data corruption in temporary test schemas
recovery.restore_sequence: 1. Retrieve latest snapshot. 2. Provision isolated DB. 3. Re-apply WAL archives. 4. Verify connectivity.
recovery.rollback_sequence: Kubernetes deployment rollback initiated automatically if target pods fail liveness check for 3 minutes
